author: y4rr
content: Plan: per-stage probes for SSD300 (VGG features, L2Norm, cls/loc heads, default boxes, softmax, NMS) and DeepLabV3 (backbone layers, ASPP branches, classifier, upsample). Fix all diagnosed bugs in one pass; re-upload all 5 models to HF (bucket cleared); update conformance tests broken by #1141 signature change.
